br_position_name: Sioux Falls City Council - Southeast District
reason: Sioux Falls Council districts are directional (NE/NW/SE/SW/Central); L2 represents them as City_Ward 1-5. Verified by point-in-polygon: 97.2% of Ward 2 voters fall inside the Southeast District polygon from Sioux Falls GIS. LLM had returned NOT_MATCHED.

br_position_name: Sioux Falls City Council - Central District
reason: Sioux Falls Council districts are directional (NE/NW/SE/SW/Central); L2 represents them as City_Ward 1-5. Verified by point-in-polygon: 99.6% of Ward 5 voters fall inside the Central District polygon from Sioux Falls GIS. LLM had wrongly matched to entire SIOUX FALLS CITY (conf 95).
